scripts.dev:clean: npm --prefix nuxt exec -- nuxi cleanup && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix nuxt install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix mvp-cv-app/backend install
scripts.db:local:init: PGPASSWORD=loadtrain_pass psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U loadtrain_user -d loadtrain -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f backend/db/init.sql
